ValidationRule.description: Retry Scheduled requires retryable=true and NextRetryAt; non-retryable cannot be Retry Scheduled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( TEXT(ResolutionStatus__c) = "Retry Scheduled", OR( NOT(IsRetryable__c), ISBLANK(NextRetryAt__c) ) ), AND( IsRetryable__c, TEXT(ResolutionStatus__c) = "Retry Scheduled", ISBLANK(NextRetryAt__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Retry Scheduled errors must be retryable and include Next Retry At.
